title: Property Consultant - Nexus Select Trust - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Nexus Select Trust - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Property Consultant looking for your next big career move? Nexus Select Trust in Hyderabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Nexus Select Trust:
Nexus Select Trust is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Title Search

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nexus Select Trust!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
